title: Appalling: Rajasthan HC on arbitral tribunal’s delay in deciding 2019 dispute despite payment of ₹14.5 crore fee
description: The Rajasthan High Court has taken a serious view of an arbitral tribunal’s failure to conclude proceedings in a dispute pending between three State power companies and HCL Infosystems Limited since 2019 [Jaipur Vidyut Vitran Nigam Limited v HCL Infosys. Limited]The Court was told that in the arbitration pending before a tribunal comprising a former Supreme Court judge and two retired High Court judges, the parties have paid about ₹14.5 crores towards arbitration fees.In an order passed on April
